VSP2_SWEET200_v2.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 73F
Recv ID: 761
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 81
Func Name: VSP

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 3

        "bitoffset": 4
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 5

      "DTCStatus.testFailedThisMonitoringCycle": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 7
      }
    }
